name: All in One Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a large skillet over medium heat. Once browned, remove from heat and drain any excess fat.
2. Add onion, celery, and tomatoes to the skillet. Stir until well combined.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. Place a layer of shredded cabbage at the bottom of a greased 2-quart casserole dish.
5. Spoon over layers of beef mixture, alternating with cabbage, ending with a layer of cabbage on top.
6. Sprinkle bread crumbs evenly over the top.
7. Bake uncovered for 1 hour in the preheated oven.
8. Serve with fried potatoes or fresh bread and a light dessert.
